summary: Superb soundboard capture of a fresh, face‑melting Cosmic Charlie rager.
review: All three reviewers rave about this show as an evergreen “rager,” with the standout moment being an incendiary performance of “Cosmic Charlie.” The two‑track SBD recording is praised for its crystal‑clear, timeless sound quality that still feels fresh after decades. Together they make a must‑listen for anyone chasing high‑energy Dead magic.

ai_rating.rationale: Consistently glowing 4–5 star reviews highlight both an outstanding performance (especially Cosmic Charlie) and superb soundboard audio, meeting criteria for a high rating.

recording_quality.technical_notes: Reviewers call the sound quality "superb" and note that it still sounds fresh after decades; no issues mentioned.

show_quality.setlist_flow: High‑energy throughout, described as a continuous rager that stays vibrant even on repeat listening.
